mnemonics: P(A or B) = P(A) + P(B) - P(A and B)
keyPoints: Probability Notation: P(A|B), P(A or B), P(A and B)
Inference using Full Joint Distributions: P(A and B) = P(B|A) * P(A)
Independence: P(A and B) = P(A) * P(B)
Baye's Rule: P(A|B) = P(B|A) * P(A) / P(B)
Baye's Rule: P(A and B) = P(A) * P(B|A)
